Container.Name: immich-album-sync
Container.Overview:
One-way album sync between two Immich servers with a responsive web UI.
Designed for Unraid users who run a private Immich server (full library) and a public/family-facing Immich server (curated albums only). Configure sync jobs, schedules, and API keys entirely through the browser — no config files or environment variables needed after the initial setup.
Features: - Web UI with password protection - Multiple sync jobs with independent schedules - Preserves original files, EXIF, GPS, and Apple Live Photos (.HEIC + .MOV) - Duplicate-safe (uses immich-go for smart detection) - Real-time log streaming in the browser - Mobile-responsive design - Add-only mode by default (safe for family sharing)
Container.Description: One-way album sync between two Immich servers with a responsive web UI. Built for users who run a private Immich (full library) and a public or family-facing Immich (curated albums only). Configure sync jobs, schedules, and API keys through the browser. Supports Apple Live Photos, duplicate detection via immich-go, and real-time log streaming. Default login: admin / admin — change on first use.

Config.Name: Web UI Port
Config.Description: Port for the Immich Album Sync web interface. Open this in your browser after the container starts.

Config.Name: App Data
Config.Description: Persistent storage for the database (config.db), download cache, and sync logs. Map to a location on your array.

Config.Name: Secret Key
Config.Description: REQUIRED: Change this to a long random string used to sign session cookies. Using the default value is insecure. Generate one at: https://1password.com/password-generator/ (32+ characters). Changing this will log out all active sessions.

Config.Name: Timezone
Config.Description: Container timezone. Used for log timestamps. Examples: America/New_York, America/Chicago, America/Los_Angeles, Europe/London, UTC. Full list: https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/List_of_tz_database_time_zones

Config.Name: Cleanup Cache After Upload
Config.Description: Set to 'true' to automatically delete downloaded originals from the cache directory after they have been successfully uploaded. Saves disk space but files will be re-downloaded on the next sync run. Can also be toggled per-job in the Web UI.

Config.Name: Cache Directory Path
Config.Description: Internal path for the download cache. Only change this if you want to map the cache to a separate volume (e.g. a fast SSD cache drive). Leave blank to use the default inside App Data.

Config.Name: Log File Path
Config.Description: Internal path for the sync log file. Viewable live in the Web UI under 'Live Logs'. Leave blank to use the default.

Config.Name: Database Path
Config.Description: Internal path for the SQLite database that stores sync job configurations and run history. Leave blank to use the default.
